headline: Anthropic’s ‘Project Glasswing’ seen accelerating cybersecurity spending, UBS says
summary: Anthropic’s newly unveiled Project Glasswing could act as a significant catalyst for cybersecurity demand, according to UBS, as advances in artificial intelligence expose a surge in previously unknown vulnerabilities and reshape how companies defend digital infrastructure. headline: CrowdStrike, Other Cybersecurity Stocks Get Crushed. Why the Anthropic Bump Didn’t Last.
summary: Cybersecurity stocks were falling sharply on Thursday after the sector rebounded earlier in the week, boosted by a new Anthropic project.  Palo Alto Networks  was down 4.7%,  CrowdStrike Holdings  was off 6.6%,  Zscaler  tumbled 11%,  SailPoint  dropped 8.9%, and  Fortinet  slid 3.8%.  Aside from concerns that improving AI models can replace critical software functions, some investors are focused on how AI, and the implementation of AI agents, introduces more complex security challenges.

headline: BTIG Cuts Zscaler to Neutral: Has the Cybersecurity Boom Already Been Priced Into This Stock?
summary: Zscaler (NASDAQ:ZS) stock just got downgraded by BTIG from Buy to Neutral, with the firm removing its price target entirely. The downgrade arrives as Zscaler stock has declined 44% year-to-date. The move raises a critical question: has the cybersecurity boom already been priced into this stock, or is something more structural at play? The call ... headline: Cybersecurity Stocks Lose Steam. The Bump From an Anthropic Partnership Didn’t Last.
summary: Cybersecurity stocks were falling sharply on Thursday after the sector rebounded earlier in the week, boosted by a new Anthropic project.  Palo Alto Networks  was down 3.3%,  CrowdStrike Holdings  was off 4.8%,  Zscaler  tumbled 8.5%,  SailPoint  dropped 4.8%, and  Fortinet  slid 2%.  Aside from concerns that improving AI models can replace critical software functions, some investors are focused on how AI, and the implementation of AI agents, introduces more complex security challenges.
